blocks.content: She called at noon the next day.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Good. Really good actually. Okay. I have to pack and Claire and I are doing lunch and then I'm loading the car. I'll be home by seven, maybe eight.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Text me when you get on the road.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And when you cross the state line.
She texted him from the road at two-thirty. From the Tennessee border at six-twelve. He was sitting in his living room pretending to watch television.
He put the phone down. The television was showing something he hadn't been watching. Outside, Millhaven was dark and cold and completely itself.
He went upstairs and changed his shirt. Then stood in front of the mirror for a second and felt slightly ridiculous about it. Then did it anyway.
